name: Ali Alhashim, CMA
about: I’m a Financial Closing Manager at SABIC, leading the monthly financial closing process…
recommendations: Abdulmajid Takrouni “I had the privilege of working with Ali as Sr. Accountant, where Ali consistently demonstrated exceptional financial analysis skills. Ali was able to effectively analyze financial data, develop models, and make informed decisions that improved overall financial performance. Ali’s expertise in financial analysis and reporting was invaluable. Ali was also able to effectively communicate financial information to financial and non-financial stakeholders, making Ali a valuable asset to any team. I highly recommend Ali for any financial role.”

Abdul Mohith “I worked and studied with Ali during University back in 2010 and kept in tocuh with Ali even after Ali moving back to Saudi. Ali is highly adaptable, has great work ethic and Ali is an encouraging, supportive and effective leader. Ali has progressed well in his home country and I highly recommend working with him.”

activity.title: Proud to have worked on SABIC’s STAR (SAP S/4HANA) implementation under the Finance function, supporting a large-scale transformation focused on standardizing Finance processes, strengthening governance and controls, and enabling data-driven decision-making across SABIC. As part of my role, I supported execution, alignment, and collaboration across stakeholders, reinforcing Finance’s role as a strategic enabler of digital transformation. ...more

Excited to have attended the 17th Annual Gulf Petrochemicals and Chemicals Association “GPCA” Forum in Qatar! It was an incredible opportunity to connect with industry leaders and learn firsthand about the latest trends in the petrochemical industry. From engaging panel discussions to insightful presentations, I gained valuable insights that will shape my work moving forward. Thank you to everyone I met for the inspiring conversations and new connections made, and thanks for SABIC’s leaders for nominating me to attend this event. Looking forward to implementing these learnings and contributing to the industry's growth! #GPCAForum ...more

I’m excited to share that I have completed “Alchemy Leadership Program” delivered by Duke Corporate Education and customized for SABIC future leaders. During this program, we were presented with different scenarios and topics that today’s leaders are facing, aiming to expand our knowledge and enhance our leadership capabilities. I’m grateful to be nominated for such program and special thanks to Mohammad Hakeem and Will Karlsen MSc PCC CBP for providing such an enriching and transformative experience. ...more

I’m happy to share that I have passed both parts of CMA exam. It was an enjoyable journey full with challenges. I’d like to thank my employer, SABIC , for giving me this opportunity and for their continues investment on their employees. I’d also like to thank the great tutor, Yasir Ali, CFA, FRM, ACCA, CMA, ACMA, CGMA , for all the valuablue information and knowledge he shared with us. الحمد لله دائماً وأبداً IMA | Institute of Management Accountants ...more
A special thanks to Petrokemya Finance Management for their recognition award.

activity.title: Congratulations and well deserved 🎉

Pleased to share the completion of the Certified Internal Auditor (CIA) designation. Together with SOCPA and CMA, this reflects a strong foundation across audit, finance, and treasury. Enabling more informed decision-making, strengthened governance, and disciplined strategy execution to support sustainable business growth. With sincere appreciation and gratitude to family and friends for their continued support and encouragement throughout this journey.

مَن عرف ما يطلب، هانَ عليه ما يبذل🦋 بفضل الله، حصلت ختامًا على رخصة المحاسب القانوني المعتمد CPA من ولاية مونتانا. I’m proud to share that, after two years of dedication and sleepless nights, I’m officially a Certified Public Accountant [ #CPA ] licensed by the Montana State Board of Public Accountants. This milestone reflects perseverance and a relentless drive for learning and growth. I look forward to applying this expertise and continuing to grow professionally✨✨ My gratitude goes to everyone who encouraged & supported me throughout this journey — especially my colleagues & management at سابك . Your support and trust inspired me to give my very best!

I just wrapped up a project where I compared ChatGPT and Claude in building real financial models inside Excel — from IFRS consolidation to bank valuation comps with Basel III and CAMELS frameworks. I think the biggest takeaway is that ai making things dramatically faster. What used to take hours of structuring, linking, and formula-writing can now happen in moments. The way we handle our daily tasks in Microsoft Office is genuinely changing. I continue to invest my free time in projects like these because I believe the best way to prepare for the future is to engage with it directly.

﴿وما توفيقي إلا بالله﴾ سعيد بمشاركة إنجاز جديد في مسيرتي المهنية بحصولي على شهادة أخصائي ضريبة القيمة المضافة كل الشكر والتقدير لإدارة HLB WYZ - Certified Public Accountants على دعمهم المستمر وتوفيرهم بيئة عمل محفزة على النمو والتطوير. خالص الشكر والتقدير للأستاذ Ali Al-Nasser ولمركز NYL Training Center على دعمهم وتوجيههم خلال هذه الرحلة. كل الامتنان لـ د. Khalid Falgi, PhD, SOCPA الذي كان له الأثر في بداية رحلتي مع هذا المجال.
